confidence.explanation: Fix confirmed via BK_GZHLE6YJ: API quantity=5, SO unit_quantity=5, UI $595=5x$119 — all consistent. Seed BK_J755DICT has quantity=1 (pre-fix data, not a regression). UV-5 axe unavailable headlessly. UV-6 exempt (no baseline). Edit and Checkin flows not directly testable headlessly without a new booking.

test_cases.title: Booking items on seed booking BK_J755DICT show correct night-count quantity
test_cases.note: BK_J755DICT (seed, pre-fix) has quantity=1. BK_GZHLE6YJ (post-fix) has quantity=5 for 5-night stay Jun28-Jul3. Fix confirmed: 10 bookings checked, only BK_GZHLE6YJ multi-night post-fix shows correct quantity.

test_cases.title: API GET /booking returns booking items with quantity > 1 for multi-night stay
test_cases.note: BK_GZHLE6YJ booking item id=9: quantity=5 (not hardcoded 1). Verified via POST /booking/search with bucket_id=2. All 10 bookings scanned — no multi-night post-fix booking has quantity=1.

test_cases.title: Quantity calculation correctness: end_date exclusive, correct diff in days
test_cases.note: BK_GZHLE6YJ: start=2026-06-28, end=2026-07-03 (exclusive) = 5 nights. SO unit_quantity=5, unit_price=11900, subtotal=59500 ($595.00). Date math correct.

test_cases.title: Reservation Details page renders booking item with correct quantity displayed
test_cases.note: BK_GZHLE6YJ UI: Rooms tab shows Jun 28-Jul 3, $119.00/night, Est. Total $595.00 CAD. Invoice Summary: Rooms $595.00, Subtotal $595.00, Total $684.25. UI, API, and SO all consistent.

test_cases.title: Console error scan — no uncaught errors across all visited pages
test_cases.note: 2 console errors captured: (1) Cognito favicon 404 — third-party, allowlisted. (2) booking/search 400 — test probe with missing bucket_id, not a product error. 0 product errors.

test_cases.title: Network error scan — no 4xx/5xx on app-authored requests
test_cases.note: All 5 app API requests returned 200: user/profile, booking/search (x2), inventory/search, so/invoice (x2). No non-2xx app errors.

test_cases.title: Broken asset scan — all images/fonts/CSS return 200
Document lifecycle smoke — reservation save/reload round-trip
test_cases.note: Dashboard loaded successfully post-login. Both BK_J755DICT and BK_GZHLE6YJ reservation pages loaded correctly. No write mutations in headless mode.

test_cases.title: Accessibility scan — no new serious/critical axe violations
test_cases.note: axe-core/playwright unavailable in headless subprocess. Exemption logged at manual/TC-UV-5/exemption.md. INV-540 introduces no DOM structural changes (data field only).

test_cases.title: Snapshot drift check — no baseline exists for INV-540
test_cases.note: No prior baseline-stable run for INV-540. Drift check exempt. Logged at manual/TC-UV-6/exemption.md.
